title: lepidium capitatum
intro: Lepidium capitatum, also known as cressleaf groundsel or smallflower peppergrass, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium capitatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
